taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Full Stack Development, Cloud Engineering, AWS, API Development, Data Integration
skill_match_scores: Full Stack Development:0.0, Cloud Engineering:1.0, AWS:1.0, API Development:1.0, Data Integration:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience, 3+ years of experience in software development, including full stack, cloud, or application architecture roles, Hands-on experience building and integrating APIs and data services using AWS cloud technologies, Strong working knowledge of modern SDLC practices and agile development methodologies, Experience with a mix of technologies such as: AWS services, Relational and NoSQL databases, Python, C#, .NET Core, Windows and Linux environments, Familiarity with automation, integration, and business process management solutions, Experience working in fast-paced, collaborative agile teams, A willingness and ability to mentor junior engineers and contribute to team skill development
preferred_quals: Experience in Financial Services, particularly Annuities or Insurance products, Prior experience building cloud-native, scalable, or event-driven architectures, Strong collaboration skills and a continuous improvement mindset
core_responsibilities: Analyze complex business problems, clarify requirements, and evaluate technical feasibility across the full stack, Contribute to solution design, including application architecture, workflows, integrations, and data flows, Design, develop, test, and deploy full stack solutions that solve complex business challenges, Partner with Product Owners to refine the backlog, prioritize use cases, and ensure shared understanding across the team, Collaborate closely with business partners, architects, and engineers on integration design, development, testing, and implementation, Build and consume APIs, develop data integrations, and leverage AWS cloud services to deliver scalable solutions, Work with large and complex datasets to derive insights and enable new product features, Own delivery from initial design through production release, supporting solutions in a DevOps-oriented environment, Communicate technical concepts, trade-offs, and outcomes clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, Contribute to automation, quality, and continuous improvement practices across the development lifecycle
job_summary: Pacific Life is dedicated to providing for loved ones and planning rewarding retirements. As a Full Stack Developer II, you will design and build scalable, cloud-based solutions supporting the Consumer Markets Division, collaborating with an agile team to solve complex business problems.
